examples: You'll need money for incidentals such as tips and taxis.
In Denver late-night taxis are elusive and far from cheap.
Laura flits about New York hailing taxis at every opportunity.
Taxis are another cheap way to get around, with a 90p flagfall then 60p per kilometre.
Though there was a regular dispatch system for all taxis before, there was nothing sepecifically for wheelchair-accessible vehicles.
